description: This file contains Balanda language training examples for val. Items covered: alphabet letter, pronoun type, sentence type, special consonant cluster.

output: I was contributing to the project
They have not helped the poor
I will not have read a book

input: Ne willa tiwutduru kese ngande’e ta kavokau we?
output: Am I not personalizing my bike with beads?
Will I be hiding the beads?
Is the school near the park?

input: Ni mamve mande gba andiso ni kateli gba.
output: She cannot work because she did not sleep.

input: Ni maka tidhii agbi tiyi gba
output: He was not coming to the house.
